title: Miyawell Fruit Vegetable Storage Basket Rack, 4 Tier Stackable Metal Wire Storage Baskets on Wheels, Fruit Vegetable Produce Basket Organizer Bins for Kitchen, Pantry, Bathroom Black
features: 【4-Tier Fruit Basket】The fruit vegetable basket bins provide large storage space, which can support 80 lbs. A perfect storage solution for kitchen,bedroom, laundry room, playroom. Overall Size: 15.75" L x 12"W x 31.2"H

【Movable or Fixable】The kitchen storage fruit basket has 4 quality wheels(2 lockable) and 4 non-slip foot mats. 360 degree rotatable wheels help you move this rolling storage basket to wherever you want.
【Stackable Storage Basket】Each metal wire storage basket is stackable and detachable. Easy-to-install buckle fixing design allows you to freely combine the basket according to your needs.
【Durable and Stainless】Fruit basket made of thick steel wire and coated with anti-rust paint. The metal frame is easy to clean, non-toxic and harmless, strong and durable, not easy to deform.

【Keep Fresh &Tidy】Mesh grid design allows air to circulate, ensuring that the fruits and vegetables are ventilated and have no peculiar smell. The included drain tray prevents soiling of the kitchen or floor.
description: Product Description Fruit Vegetable Basket for Kitchen 4 Tier Fruit Basket for Kitchen - Vegetable Storage Organizer Stand Metal Wire Basket Bins Rack with Rolling Wheels for Fruit Vegetable Produce Pantry Fruit Basket Stand 4 Tiered Wire Floor Basket Stackable and Detachable Fruit Vegetable Storage Basket Lockable Rolling Wheels& Non-Slip Feet Large Stackable Storage Bins Kitchen Vegetable Storage Rack Adjustable Non Slip Feet Fruit basket comes with 4pcs non-slip foot pads ,can be adsorbed on the counter or the floor to ensure the stability. Movable Tray Fruit vegetable storage Basket has a bottom tray, which helps to collect the dirt and keep dry and clean. 360° Rolling Wheels Fruit basket has 4 durable wheels(2 lockable) they are all made of ABS, move smoothly and without noise. Easy to Install No screws needed, adopts a buckle design .Each basket is completely detachable and stackable, can be freely assembled into 1 to 4 tiers Mesh The open design of this metal wire basket allows air to circulate.Perfect storage solution for onion storage, fruit basket, vegetable storage bins Stable Standing fruit basket made of high-quality thick carbon steel with strong bearing capacity .Coated with anti-rust paint and will not rust. Product Size Box Include Baskets x 4 Basket Supporter x 6 Rolling Wheels x 4 Movable Tray x 1 Adjustable Anti-Skid Feet x 4 4 Tier Fruit Basket for Kitchen Standing 4 Tier Vegetable Basket Produce for Kitchen Storage Bins Product Weight：3.6 kg One Basket Size ：40.0cmL x 30.48cmW x 10.16cmH Overall Product Size ：40.0cmL x 30.48cmW x 79.24cmH Kitchen Bathroom Bedroom
